content.text: Switch the fetch request from JSON to form-encoded content type and accept header.

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: web/src/request.js
@@ export function buildRequest(payload) {
     headers: {
-      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
-      'Accept': 'application/json',
+      'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
+      'Accept': 'text/plain',
       'X-Client': 'web',
     },
*** End Patch
